title: Soul Healer Totem
description: Replaces totem of undying with the soul healer from Minecraft dungeons. Nice if your Minecraft skin doesn't look good as a totem and you like Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
A very simple resource pack, and the totem looks pretty much identical to Minecraft Dungeons. It looks nice, it's small in your hand and doesn't block the whole screen, and in F5 it actully looks like you're holding it by the chain!
Feel free to use in modpacks btw.
